name: vwo
description: Reads and writes VWO (Visual Website Optimizer) A/B testing campaigns.

risk.read: external VWO API read of experiment/campaign metadata
risk.write: external mutation of VWO campaign configuration, including starting/pausing/stopping live A/B experiments; approval required
risk.approval: read: none, read-only campaign directory sync. write: required for all mutating actions (create/update campaigns).
